mapper.sql: addr_id, user_id, mobile, is_default, consignee, province_id, province, city_id, city, area_id, area, post_code, addr
mapper.select: select from user_addr where user_id = #{userId} order by is_default desc, addr_id desc
select from user_addr where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1 limit 1
select count(1) from user_addr where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_addr (user_id, mobile, is_default, consignee, province_id, province, city_id, city, area_id, area, post_code, addr) values (#{userId}, #{mobile}, #{isDefault}, #{consignee}, #{provinceId}, #{province}, #{cityId}, #{city}, #{areaId}, #{area}, #{postCode}, #{addr})
mapper.update: update user_addr set mobile = #{mobile}, is_default = #{isDefault}, consignee = #{consignee}, province_id = #{provinceId}, province = #{province}, city_id = #{cityId}, city = #{city}, area_id = #{areaId}, area = #{area}, post_code = #{postCode}, addr = #{addr} where addr_id = #{addrId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from user_addr where addr_id = #{addrId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update user_addr set is_default = 0 where user_id = #{userId}
